name: vitals-flowsheet
title: Vitals Flowsheet
description: The time × parameter grid, with sticky headers, flagged cells, and missing observations that say so.

props.name: columns
props.description: `{ key, label, sublabel? }` — the times observations were TAKEN.

props.name: parameters
props.description: `{ key, label, unit?, values }` — values keyed by column. A column with no entry was not measured.

props.name: caption
props.description: Required. Names the grid and its period.

props.name: missingLabel
props.description: Rendered in a cell with no observation. Never blank, never zero.

props.name: FlowsheetCell
props.description: `flag` is the laboratory's or the caller's — the grid classifies nothing.

clinicalNotes: Three refusals define this component. It will not render a missing observation as blank: an empty cell that looks like a normal value is how a deteriorating patient goes unnoticed on a busy ward, so an unmeasured cell says "Not measured". It will not move a late-charted value to the time it was charted — a value sits at the time it was TAKEN, with `chartedLate` marking that the record was written afterwards, because doing otherwise silently rewrites the clinical timeline. And it will not signal abnormality by colour alone: every flagged cell carries a glyph (↑ ↓ !) and a screen-reader word, so the flag survives greyscale, print, and colour-blindness. Row and column headers stick, so a value scrolled away from its parameter or its time is never orphaned.
notes: The round's densest component. Built from primitives — no charting library. Give it a bounded height so the sticky headers have something to stick against.
